concepts: anchored-vwap value hold with directional expansion

thesis_hint: Explore a new concept this cycle. Recent visible history is still explore-heavy enough to preserve the soft 70/30 doctrine, but the failed batches are clustering around slower 4h/daily structures and over-filtered event logic that never trades. Rotate away from BTC/1d and AXS/4h while staying inside the supported universe. Target SOL 1h and demand 3 materially different but density-first intraday specs: one opening-pullback continuation branch that only enters after an early reset holds above a fast/medium anchor stack, one anchored-VWAP value-hold branch that requires directional expansion out of acceptance rather than a raw breakout chase, and one failed-breakdown trend-day transition branch that turns long only after downside inventory is reclaimed and momentum state flips. Do not clone ETH channel or KAMA-stoch families, do not recycle the DOGE/BANANA zero-trade grammar, and do not write ceremonial multi-confirmation setups that cannot print 15+ trades.
stop_condition: Stop the batch when either (A) one spec reaches walk-forward QScore >= 1.0 with profit_factor >= 1.12, total_trades >= 15, and max_drawdown_pct <= 9.0, or (B) 4 materially different specs are exhausted without a pass. Abort any spec with total_trades < 12, profit_factor < 1.00, or max_drawdown_pct > 12.0.
rotation_reason: Force exploration this cycle: soft 70/30 balance still favors explore, recent visible concentration is drifting toward slower-timeframe zero-trade batches, and SOL/1h is the clean supported rotation away from both the ETH-family exploit lane and the recent BTC/AXS paths.
